content.en:
The Frostless Lord quickly contacted the other Legendary Realm Lords, which was a big deal after all.

Soon.

The Frostless Lord, the Dragon Ancient Lord, the Barren River Lord, the Baiheng Lord, and other Legendary Realm lords gathered together and started a meeting.

The Frostless Lord mentioned at the meeting, "The Endless Lord came to me not long ago, and there is a great opportunity for us to participate. "

"What big chance?"

The Lords of the Legendary Realm were curious, could it be that the Endless Lord had discovered some amazing treasure land?

So, the frostless lord told the treasure of the three thousand kites.

When many Legendary Realm Lords heard this, they immediately frowned.

Lord Longgu said: "The strength of the Black Water Lord is very strong, he has mastered several supreme skills, and his strength is at the top among ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, much stronger than me, we need at least three Legendary Realm Lords to be able to compete with him." As for wanting to kill the Blackwater Lord, he can't do it at all. If he wanted to escape, no one would be able to catch up with him except for the Peak Legendary Realm Lord. Is it worth offending such a Legendary Realm Lord?"

"You don't want to improve your strength, the Black Water Lord has such strength, and the three thousand kis lins are afraid that it will play a big role Moreover, it can also help us cultivate more Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Land. Lord Frostless said.

"Yes, if there had been a treasure like the Three Thousand Kite Lin, I am afraid that I would have been promoted to the legendary realm long ago, and I would not have to suffer for endless years. Lord Baiheng said with deep feelings.

"If the information is true, three thousand iris is enough for us to do it without a holy place, and the lord of the black water did defect to Moshan at the beginning, and destroyed Moshan with other legendary realm lords, the three thousand iris is not his thing, and it is not too much for us to snatch it. Lord Wasteland said.

"The point is that the Endless Lord is sure to steal the three thousand kites? This is an uncertain factor, because we must ensure that the Blackwater Lord is held back for enough time. The Blackwater Lord is stronger than all of us here, and we need to ask the True Spirit Lord to help, and with him, we can hold back the Blackwater Lord's fight. Lord Dragongu suggested.

The True Spirit Lord is the second Legendary Realm Lord in the True Void Holy Land, and the Dragon Gu Lord is ranked third.

If there is a True Spirit Lord joining, the success rate of this plan is higher.

"I'm going to ask the True Spirit Lord, as for the conflict, Lord Frostless, you communicate with the Endless Lord to make sure that Blackwater Mountain doesn't find out. As for which legendary lords sacrificed a doppelganger, Lord of the Wasteland, you go and arrange it. Remember, those legendary lords who sacrificed their clones, don't let them know the truth, otherwise the Blackwater Lord will snoop into their past and discover the truth, and when the time comes, they will find out that it was we who stole his three thousand iris from the True Saintless Land. "Longgu Ling/Chuan Dao.

The Lord of the Wasteland agreed: Tell them the truth, and compensate him for the loss of the scarf when the time comes, and make up for it As long as the Lord of Blackwater doesn't know the truth, no matter how he spies into time and space, he will find that the truth is that there is a problem inside Blackwater Mountain, and his three thousand kites were stolen from the inside, and we are really useless and just pawns to be used. "

"Thanks to the Endless Leader's weird ability, he is not afraid of time and space exploration, and he disguises his identity, which is difficult to see, otherwise this plan will be difficult to implement. "Lord Frost Freedom said.

Subsequently.

Lord Longgu has gone to ask for the True Spirit Lord.

The True Spirit Lord has been in retreat and cultivating, no matter what, usually the big things are taken care of by the Dragon Gu Lord, but if he really needs the True Spirit Lord, he will also help.

On the other side, the Frostless Lord discussed with Ye Tian about the matter of killing some Legendary Lords of the True Void Holy Land, the number of kills must be large first, and it is best to kill a few Legendary Lords with relatively high status.

In this way, the true saint can be angry

And Ye Tian needs to disguise himself as another Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord to make a move, which requires killing another Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord of Blackwater Mountain, which is a very simple matter for Ye Tian.

And so.

As the Qinghuan Lord, Ye Tian invited the body of the Xingwei Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord to go to a treasure land, and this Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord also had a clone, which was also targeted by Ye Tian's copy body.

This Transcendental Legendary Lord is called Lord Beyun.

On this day,

After Ye Tian lured out Lord Beiyun, he attacked his body and clone at the same time, annihilating him in an instant, and immediately copied Lord Beiyun's body and returned to Heishui Mountain.

In this way, the Beiyun Lord and the Qinghuan Lord of Blackwater Mountain were all copies of Ye Tian's body.

This copy of the body in every way is undoubtedly with the ontology, and heaven and earth recognize his identity.

Soon after, the Frostless Lord informed Ye Tian that the True Saintless Land was ready.

He's ready to act.

So, Ye Tian went directly to a territory in the True Saintless Land as Lord Beiyun.

In this realm, a group of legendary lords are in a meeting, because a treasure has been discovered here, and they are discussing the development of the treasure land.

An incomparably precious vein has been discovered in this treasure land, which is being excavated, and a lot of it has been excavated.

It is stipulated that after they have finished digging, they can distribute some of them themselves, and hand over the rest to the True No Holy Land

Therefore, they were deliberating on what would be distributed in the future.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian descended as the Lord of Beiyun.

Buzz Buzz !!!

One Legendary Lord after another was killed by Ye Tian, and even a Transcendent Realm Lord was killed by Ye Tian

Then, Ye Tian disguised himself as snatching away the resources here, as well as many treasures, and immediately fled (Deli's) and returned to Heishui Mountain.

There is no holy place.

A group of Legendary Lords reported that there were Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords attacking them, which was a provocation to the True Void Holy Land and a declaration of war against the True Void Saint Land.

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords were furious, and the Frostless Lord came directly to the place where the accident occurred, and spied into time and space to see Ye Tian's disguised Beiyun Lord Hook.

The Beiyun Lord in Ye Tian's disguise was shielded by the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Sacred Land, so even if he spied on the past, he couldn't spy on it, so he couldn't find out whether it was true or false.

But the outside and the aura are not covered, and it can be deduced that it is the Beiyun Lord of Heishui Mountain.

"'Black Water Mountain!!

The Frostless Lord was furious, as if he really was.

As a result, one after another Legendary Realm Lords descended on Heishui Mountain.

And every Legendary Realm Lord is full of killing intent. _
